THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASSAB, MARIA BRICENO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUARTE, HENRY $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $525.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,525.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
